content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo looks like a rumpled, bespectacled scarecrow who wandered out of a Portland coffee shop and forgot to go back — flannel, messy hair, coffee-stained sleeves. But then you talk to him and realize he's perceptive and gentle in a way most guys in this city aren't. We've had a few really good conversations at the coffee shop about film scores and music. He recognized Ennio Morricone deep cuts, which earned him permanent respect. He's a programmer but I suspect he's really a musician in hiding. I think he's quietly unhappy about something. I see him as a coffee-shop friend I'd like to know better. I know his startup is struggling.
summary:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo looks like a rumpled, bespectacled scarecrow who wandered out of a Portland coffee shop and forgot to go back — flannel, messy hair, coffee-stained sleeves. But then you talk to him and realize he's perceptive and gentle in a way most guys in this city aren't. We've had a few really good conversations at the coffee shop about film scores and music. He recognized Ennio Morricone deep cuts, which earned him permanent respect. He's a programmer but I suspect he's really a musician in hiding. I think he's quietly unhappy about something. I see him as a coffee-shop friend I'd like to know better. I know his startup is struggling.
